name: Gene Sequence Lookup
description: Fetches the coding DNA sequence (CDS) for a gene from NCBI Entrez given a gene name and organism. Queries the NCBI Gene database, retrieves the linked mRNA/RefSeq record, and extracts the annotated CDS. Common organism aliases (e.g. 'E. coli', 'mouse', 'Arabidopsis') are resolved automatically.

inputs.name: gene_name
inputs.description: Gene symbol or name to search for, e.g. 'cscB', 'lacZ', 'GAPDH', 'cas9'.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Organism name or common alias. Accepts scientific names ('Escherichia coli') or common aliases ('E. coli', 'mouse', 'human', 'yeast', 'Arabidopsis', 'zebrafish', 'rice', 'corn', etc.).

inputs.name: email
inputs.description: Email address for NCBI Entrez (required by NCBI usage policy). Overrides the default set at initiation.

inputs.name: api_key
inputs.description: Optional NCBI API key. Increases rate limit from 3 to 10 requests/second.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: How many Gene DB hits to try before giving up. Default 5.

outputs.description: Gene metadata and CDS nucleotide sequence from NCBI.

product.description: Protein product name from CDS annotation.

output.summary: Retrieved 3075 bp CDS for lacZ (beta-galactosidase) from Escherichia coli via accession NM_001234.1.
